title: FAU Main Campus
text: Florida Atlantic University's main campus is in Boca Raton, Florida. The address is 777 Glades Road, Boca Raton, FL. Key campus services include the Student Affairs office, Registrar, and the Health Center.

title: Housing and Residence Life
text: FAU offers on-campus housing options including residence halls and apartment-style living. The Housing & Residence Life office helps with assignments, roommate matching, and housing policies. Freshmen are encouraged to apply early.

title: Student Health Services
text: Student Health Services provides primary care, counseling referrals, and immunization records. Contact the Health Center to schedule appointments and find out about available insurance options.

title: Academic Calendar
text: FAU's academic calendar lists semester start/end dates, breaks, and important registration deadlines. Students should check the official FAU calendar for add/drop deadlines and exam dates.

title: Student Organizations
text: FAU supports many student organizations across interests including academic clubs, cultural groups, and recreational clubs. The Student Involvement office manages club registration and campus events.
